verificationCode.subject: Verification code for {userName}
verificationCode.intro: To complete your {actionType}, please use the following verification code:
verificationCode.expiration: This code is valid for 24 hours. If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.

userBan.subject: Your account has been banned
userBan.intro_with_reason_permanent: Your account has been banned on the subdomain {clientSiteId} for the following reason: {reason}. This ban is permanent.
userBan.intro_with_reason_temporary: Your account has been banned on the subdomain {clientSiteId} for the following reason: {reason}. The ban is effective until {banDuration}.
userBan.intro_no_reason: Your account has been banned on the subdomain {clientSiteId}.
